Article Title: G'day Chennai! Australia's Big Bash opener to be held in Tamil Nadu this December
Article Text:
PM Modi gifts former Australia skipper Steve Waugh two-decade-old photograph during MCG visit

Cricket Australia hopeful of hosting IPL match in Oz

Australia's T20 competition, Big Bash League, will travel thousands of kilometres for its opening match between defending champions Perth Scorchers and Melbourne Renegades, which will take place in Chennai on Dec 12.Australian PM Anthony Albanese made the announcement after a meeting with PM Narendra Modi at Melbourne Cricket Ground. This will be the first instance of a foreign cricket league playing in India, said Albanese as he joined Modi in unveiling a sports collaboration map.Modi and Albanese were joined by former Australia captains Steve Waugh and Lisa Sthalekar for an event at MCG to celebrate India-Australia sporting ties.BBL's opening match at Chennai on Dec 12 will kick off a week-long G'day Namaste festival of Australian sport, culture and business engagement, said Prime Minister Anthony Albanese. He added that he was certain Australia would support India's bid for the 2036 Olympics.PM Modi welcomed the announcement, saying that for any sporting league, staging an event in India guarantees tremendous reach and viewership.Following the announcement, Cricinfo reported that Cricket Australia is hopeful this could pave the way for the hosting of an IPL match in Australia in the future."There's certainly been interest from time to time at state govt level and at venue level, and with some of our clubs to imagine what that could look like bringing an IPL game out here," said Alistair Dobson, executive general manager of Big Bash Leagues.Major T20 leagues have so far not been offshoring except, as the report said, when forced to, like in the IPL's case by the Covid pandemic. Cricket Australia was reported to be confident that the match would be the most-watched game in Australian domestic league history for any sport, eclipsing the rugby league state of origin decider that broke the local broadcast record with 6 million viewers.A Reuters report said that the announcement came amid opposition to private investment in the Big Bash, which critics say could lead to the tournament ceding control to IPL franchises, and that Cricket Australia hopes to open up the Big Bash League to private investment to boost its finances and improve competitiveness in T20 cricket.On the sports collaboration roadmap, Indian govt said it would promote cooperation in training and capacity building, sports science and technology, and sports industry and investment.
Article Summary: Big bash league's opening match will take place in chennai on dec 12. Australian pm anthony albanese made the announcement after a meeting with pm narendra modi at melbourne cricket ground. Pm modi welcomed the announcement, saying that for any sporting league, staging an event in india guarantees tremendous reach and viewership.

Article Title: Did officials miss this? Why Bellingham's England goal vs Norway should NOT have stood after bizarre camera cable incident
Article Text:
Jude Bellingham celebrates England's victory over Norway in a World Cup quarterfinal soccer match in Miami Gardens, Fla., Saturday, July 11, 2026. (AP Photo/Julio Cortez)

England fight back after Norway's bright start

England's Jude Bellingham (10) scores their first goal past Norway goalkeeper Oerjan Nyland (1) during the World Cup quarterfinal soccer match between Norway and England in Miami Gardens, Fla., Saturday, July 11, 2026. (AP Photo/Marta Lavandier)

The camera cable controversy

What do the Laws of the Game say?

Connected ball technology also comes into focus

England march on despite the controversy

England's Harry Kane (9) and other England players celebrate at the end of the World Cup quarterfinal soccer match between Norway and England in Miami Gardens, Fla., Saturday, July 11, 2026. (AP Photo/George Walker IV)

England’s FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-final victory over Norway has been overshadowed by a controversial moment involving Jude Bellingham’s first-half equaliser. Footage circulating after the dramatic 2-1 extra-time win has sparked debate over a possible incident in the build-up to the goal, with questions now being raised over whether play should have been stopped under the IFAB Laws of the Game.The quarter-final began with Norway carrying the momentum of their historic run to the last eight, and they were rewarded in the 36th minute.Andreas Schjelderup produced a superb finish from the left side of the penalty area to give Ståle Solbakken's side a deserved 1-0 lead, putting England under pressure heading into the closing stages of the first half.The Three Lions thought they had found their response in first-half stoppage time. Goalkeeper Orjan Nyland launched a long goal kick towards midfield, where Harry Kane won possession before the move developed through Anthony Gordon. Gordon then slipped an excellent through ball into the path of Jude Bellingham, who took two touches before calmly finishing beyond Nyland to level the score at 1-1 in the 45+2nd minute.At first glance, it appeared to be a brilliantly constructed equaliser. However, replays shown later raised a potentially significant question over the very beginning of the move.Footage broadcast by FOX Sports appeared to suggest that Nyland's goal kick may have clipped one of the overhead Spidercam cables suspended above the pitch.The apparent contact seemed to alter the ball's trajectory before it dropped into Harry Kane's path, allowing England to regain possession and launch the attack that eventually resulted in Bellingham's equaliser.Journalist Melissa Reddy later reposted the clip after the original FOX Sports video remained geolocked to viewers in the United States, bringing the incident to wider attention.Importantly, there remains no definitive evidence confirming that the ball actually struck the cable. Neither the match officials nor FIFA have officially stated that contact occurred.Nevertheless, the footage immediately became one of the biggest talking points of the match.According to the International Football Association Board (IFAB) Laws of the Game, if the ball strikes a ceiling or any fixture hanging over the field of play, including an overhead camera cable or wire, the referee must stop play.The correct restart in that situation is a dropped ball awarded to the team that last touched the ball at the point where contact with the fixture occurred.Former FIFA referee Mark Clattenburg, working as an analyst for FOX Sports during the World Cup, explained that if the ball had indeed struck the cable, the officials should have declared a dead ball and restarted play with a drop ball.However, such a decision would have depended on either the on-field officiating team or the VAR identifying the contact in real time. As no intervention occurred, play continued uninterrupted and Bellingham's goal was allowed to stand.Norway's frustration was evident after the incident. Manager Ståle Solbakken was seen engaged in a lengthy discussion with the match referee at half-time, while several Norway players appeared to point and gesture in protest as they reacted to the decision. However, neither Solbakken nor his players publicly confirmed the precise nature of their complaints.The incident has also put the spotlight on the connected ball technology used at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. Each official match ball contains a microchip that sends real-time data to the VAR system, tracking movement, speed and touches to assist decision-making. The technology has already influenced major calls during the tournament, including Sweden’s goal against Tunisia and Croatia’s disallowed late equaliser against Portugal. Whether it detected any contact with the overhead cable in Miami remains unknown.The debate over Bellingham's equaliser did not end the drama. Norway thought they had reclaimed the lead in the 56th minute when Torbjørn Heggem found the net, only for VAR to disallow the goal after determining that Erling Haaland had fouled Elliot Anderson during the build-up.The match eventually went into extra time, where Bellingham struck again in the 93rd minute. Morgan Rogers' long-range effort was parried into his path, allowing the Real Madrid midfielder to score his second goal of the night and seal a 2-1 victory.England's win sends Thomas Tuchel's side into the FIFA World Cup semi-finals, where they will face the winner of the remaining quarter-final between Argentina and Switzerland. Yet despite the result, much of the post-match discussion has centred on the controversial equaliser, with debate continuing over whether the apparent camera cable contact should have halted play before England's leveller.
Article Summary: England's 2-1 extra-time win over norway has been overshadowed by a controversial moment involving jude bellingham’s first-half equaliser. Footage circulating after the match has sparked debate over a possible incident in the build-up to the goal. Questions now being raised over whether play should have been stopped under the ifab laws of the game.

Article Title: England vs Norway FIFA World Cup QF match result: Jude Bellingham's brace propels England into World Cup semifinals after extra-time win
Article Text:
Jude Bellingham scored a crucial extra-time goal for England's World Cup semi-final victory. Norway took an early lead through Andreas Schjelderup before a controversial moment aided England.(AP Photo)

A legendary performance from Jude Bellingham has fired England into the semi-finals of the FIFA World Cup 2026 after a breathless 2-1 extra-time triumph over Norway at the Hard Rock Stadium in Miami.On a night filled with high drama, bizarre technical controversies, and intense tactical battles, Bellingham proved to be the ultimate difference-maker. The Real Madrid superstar struck in the third minute of extra time, pouncing on a rebound after Orjan Nyland failed to clean up a venomous Morgan Rogers shot. The strike marked Bellingham’s sixth goal of the tournament, tying him with teammate Harry Kane and placing him just two behind frontrunners Kylian Mbappé and Lionel Messi.Norway, whose historic quarter-final run and charismatic "Viking row" celebrations had taken the internet by storm, struck first. In the 36th minute, Andreas Schjelderup stunned the possession-dominant Three Lions, firing a brilliant shot off the right post and into the back of the net.The match was turned on its head right before halftime through a moment of immense controversy. A Norwegian goal kick appeared to strike an aerial camera cable before dropping to Elliot Anderson, who quickly fed Bellingham for a clinical, low equalizer.By tournament rules, play should have been halted for a drop ball, but the infraction went unnoticed, sparking frantic protests from the Norwegian bench.Norway’s fortune dimmed further in the second half. In the 56th minute, Torbjørn Heggem bundled home a rebound to throw the stadium into a frenzy, only for VAR to cruelly disallow the goal due to an Erling Haaland foul in the box.England’s defense, anchored by Jordan Pickford, who pulled off a point-blank save against Haaland in the first half, successfully neutralized the Manchester City talisman, holding him goalless for the first time all tournament. By the second half of extra time, an exhausted Haaland was subbed off for Jorgen Strand Larsen, signaling the end of Norway's aerial threat.Sixty years of hurt have never felt closer to ending for England, who now march to Atlanta for Wednesday’s blockbuster semi-final against either Argentina or SwitzerlandEarlier, both teams observed a poignant moment of silence to honor 25-year-old South African midfielder Jayden Adams, whose tragic passing was announced on Saturday.
Article Summary: Jude bellingham scored a crucial extra-time goal for england's world cup semi-final victory. Norway took an early lead through andreas schjelderup before a controversial moment aided england. Both teams observed a poignant moment of silence to honor 25-year-old south african midfielder jayden adams.

Article Title: IND vs ENG 5th T20I: Shivam Dube's big blunder turns the game in England's favour - WATCH
Article Text:
Shivam Dube (Image credit: X)

England complete 4-0 series sweep



NEW DELHI: India made the perfect start in the fifth and final T20I against England by dismissing Phil Salt early at The Rose Bowl in Southampton. But just a few overs later, a costly fielding mistake from Shivam Dube gave England captain Harry Brook a lifeline.The incident happened in the sixth over of England's innings. Fast bowler Prince Yadav bowled a short delivery outside off stump, and Brook went for a big pull shot. Instead, he got a thick top edge that went high into the air. It looked like a straightforward catch for Dube, who ran back from the infield.However, he failed to judge the ball properly and dropped the big chance.The dropped chance proved to be a huge turning point.Brook was still in the early stages of his innings and made full use of the reprieve. He went on to smash an unbeaten 95 off just 46 balls, while Jos Buttler hammered 131 from 64 deliveries.The pair stitched together a stunning 233-run partnership for the second wicket, helping England post a massive 257.India's poor fielding did not end there. Dube later dismissed Buttler in the 19th over, but by then the England skipper had already done the damage.Brook was also dropped again on 90 by Ishan Kishan.Chasing a daunting target of 258, India started aggressively but could only manage 201/8 in 20 overs despite half-centuries from Ishan Kishan (56) and Tilak Varma (53).England sealed a 56-run victory to complete a 4-0 clean sweep in the five-match series.The defeat also cost India the No. 1 spot in the ICC Men's T20I rankings. England climbed to the top after extending India's losing streak in T20Is to six matches.
Article Summary: England beat india by 56 runs in the fifth and final t20i in southampton. Shivam dube dropped harry brook on 95 in the sixth over of england's innings. Jos buttler hit 131 from 64 deliveries to help england post a massive 257. India could only manage 201/8 in 20 overs despite half-centuries from ishan kishan and tilak varma.

Article Title: How Jude Bellingham and girlfriend Ashlyn Castro kept their Raya romance completely private for months before the world noticed
Article Text:
Jude Bellingham and girlfriend Ashlyn Castro (Instagram)

Who is Ashlyn Castro and how did she meet Jude Bellingham ?

Has Ashlyn Castro confirmed her relationship with Jude Bellingham?

Has Ashlyn Castro been watching England at the 2026 World Cup?

Jude Bellingham has been one of England's most important players at the 2026 FIFA World Cup, helping the Three Lions into the semi-finals. But as his on-field performances continue to draw headlines, curiosity about his personal life has grown just as fast. The 22-year-old Real Madrid midfielder is dating American model and content creator Ashlyn Castro, 28, and the two have gone to considerable lengths to keep things quiet. Fans, however, have been paying close attention.Ashlyn Castro was born on December 17, 1997, in California, making her six years older than Bellingham. She has built a following of over 730,000 on Instagram as a model, influencer and content creator, working with brands like Clarins and appearing in DJ Khaled's music video for Popstar. Her grid leans into beauty, lifestyle and travel, with her bio offering nothing more than a green heart.The couple reportedly matched on Raya, the celebrity-exclusive dating app, sometime in late 2024. Neither has confirmed this publicly, but the timeline supports it. By November 2024, the two were already interacting on Instagram. Then in January 2025, they were photographed together having lunch in Madrid after Real Madrid's Champions League match against RB Salzburg.Shortly after, Ashlyn was spotted at the Bernabeu alongside Bellingham's mother, Denise, which said quite a lot without either of them saying anything at all.ID@undefinedCaption not available.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Not in any formal sense. Both have stayed conspicuously quiet about what is clearly a real, ongoing relationship. The confirmation has come through presence rather than posts. In February 2025, Ashlyn attended Real Madrid's match against Girona, sitting in the VIP section with Jude's family. That kind of access does not happen by accident.The most telling moment came around Jude's 22nd birthday. Ashlyn's Instagram Stories showed the two singing SZA's Snooze at what appeared to be a karaoke session, dancing together and sharing a kiss. It was the closest thing to a public declaration either has offered, and even then it was casual, almost incidental.The couple were also seen together at the Spanish tennis open in April, further confirming this is not a situationship the tabloids have been misreading.She has been present, and fans have noticed. Ashlyn was in the stands for England's 4-2 group stage victory over Croatia at Dallas Stadium on June 17. After the match, she and Jude were seen sharing a quick kiss in the stands, which many took as confirmation of everything that had been speculated about for months. She returned on July 1 for England's final group game against DR Congo, spotted arriving with other players' partners.She has not shared any of this on her Instagram, which fits the pattern entirely. The relationship exists in glimpses rather than announcements: a birthday video here, a pitch-side appearance there. For a footballer of Bellingham's profile, that kind of restraint is not accidental. It is a choice.Whether that changes as England's tournament run continues remains to be seen. The deeper they go, the harder it becomes to keep anything quiet.
Article Summary: Jude bellingham has been one of england's most important players at the 2026 fifa world cup. The 22-year-old real madrid midfielder is dating american model and content creator ashlyn castro, 28. The couple reportedly matched on raya, the celebrity-exclusive dating app, sometime in late 2024.

Article Title: Who are Jude Bellingham’s parents? Inside Denise and Mark Bellingham’s role in shaping the England star
Article Text:
Jude Bellingham’s parents (Image Via Getty)

Who are Jude Bellingham’s parents Denise and Mark Bellingham?



What do Denise and Mark Bellingham do and are they still married?

Jude Bellingham has become one of England’s biggest football stars, but he has often said his success would not have been possible without his parents, Denise and Mark Bellingham. From driving him to training sessions to making big career decisions, they have played a huge role in every step of his journey. As England continues its FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign, many fans want to know more about the couple who helped raise one of football’s brightest talents.Denise and Mark Bellingham have supported Jude since he first started playing football as a child. They also have another son, Jobe Bellingham, who followed the same path and now plays for Borussia Dortmund after spells with Birmingham City and Sunderland.The family raised both boys in Stourbridge near Birmingham. As Jude’s career grew, they made major sacrifices to help both sons chase their dreams. When Jude joined Borussia Dortmund in Germany in 2020, Denise moved with him so he could settle into a new country.At the same time, Mark stayed in England with Jobe, who was still playing for Birmingham City. Later, when Jobe signed for Sunderland, Mark moved with him to continue supporting his younger son.Jude has never hidden how much his parents mean to him. Speaking to The Guardian in 2020, he said: “Before being great parents, they’re great people. I’ve grown up around them and seen the way they interact with other people, seen the way they treat people. When you have people like that, you don’t have to be told how to behave, you pick that up from them.”When he was presented as a Real Madrid player in 2023, Jude also praised his mother, saying: “Without my mum, sometimes I’d get too low with the lows or too high with the highs, and I stay pretty humble because I’ve got her around. It’s also great to have her there because she’s a great laugh as well. We get on so well and we’re always doing stuff together.”Before becoming involved in his sons’ football careers, Mark Bellingham worked as a sergeant with West Midlands Police. He was also a well-known non-league footballer and played for several clubs well into his forties.Jude has described him as one of his first football heroes because watching his father play helped him fall in love with the game.After Jude and Jobe’s careers took off, Mark left the police force and began helping manage their careers. Denise comes from a Human Resources background and is widely seen as the person who keeps the family’s day-to-day planning, finances, and travel organized.Together, they also backed Jude’s biggest career moves, including his transfers to Borussia Dortmund and later Real Madrid instead of staying in the Premier League.Former coach Kevin Betsy praised Mark’s influence while speaking to The Evening Standard, saying: ”[Jude’s dad] comes from the police background, so he’s very clear and concise, very disciplined, and that reflects on Jude and Jobe.”Reports from German newspaper Bild in 2025 claimed Denise and Mark had separated after more than 20 years of marriage after they were seen sitting apart during a Borussia Dortmund match.However, neither of them has publicly confirmed the reports. Despite the speculation, both continue to support Jude and Jobe and remain closely involved in their football journeys.
Article Summary: Denise and mark bellingham have supported jude since he first started playing football as a child. They also have another son, jobe bellingham, who followed the same path and now plays for borussia dortmund after spells with birmingham city and sunderland.

Jayden Adams’ business ventures, investments, and lifestyle

Jayden Adams’ football legacy

Jayden Adams was a talented South African footballer who made a name for himself as a central midfielder for Mamelodi Sundowns and the South African national team. Following his death, many fans have been searching for details about his football career, earnings, and estimated net worth. Although neither Adams nor his club ever publicly disclosed his finances, online estimates placed his net worth at aroundin 2026. Most of his income came from his professional football career, including his club salary, match bonuses, and national team appearances, while his growing reputation also increased his commercial value.Jayden Adams was regarded as one of South Africa’s rising football talents. While his personal wealth was modest compared to footballers playing in Europe’s biggest leagues, public estimates placed his net worth at aroundSince there were no official financial disclosures from Adams or Mamelodi Sundowns, this figure should be treated as an estimate.His transfer market value was significantly higher than his personal wealth. In 2026, his estimated market value stood at around, but this represented the amount clubs could have been willing to pay for his transfer rather than the money he personally owned.After joining Mamelodi Sundowns in 2024, Adams earned through his club contract, appearance fees, competition bonuses, and performances in domestic and continental competitions.He also received additional earnings from representing Bafana Bafana in international football. While his exact salary was never made public, Sundowns have long been known as one of the highest-paying clubs in South African football.The biggest contributor to Adams’ wealth was his professional football career. His pay at Mamelodi Sundowns sort of became the base of everything he earned, while extra bonuses for league outings, local cup ties, and continental matches stacked onto his yearly income.Also, his appearances for South Africa helped swell his earnings a bit and, in the same breath, boosted his profile across African football.As he continued to develop into one of the country’s promising midfielders, his performances attracted greater attention and strengthened his transfer market value.Although Adams had become a well-known player in South African football, there were no widely reported international endorsement deals linked to his name.Any commercial income was believed to have come mainly from regional sponsorships and football-related promotional activities rather than major global brand partnerships.No reports were ever found that Jayden Adams owned major businesses or was making big investments beyond football. Also, there wasn’t any public information going around that he held onto luxury properties, like an expensive watch collection, or a high-end car set.During his playing years, Adams kept things sort of private, and in general people mostly associated him with football. Compared to a lot of well-known global stars, he didn’t really draw attention for extravagant spending or these luxury buys, in any obvious way.As his career progressed, many believed his financial portfolio would eventually expand beyond football, but no such investments were publicly confirmed.Although his career was cut short, Jayden Adams left a lasting impression on South African football. His performances for Mamelodi Sundowns and Bafana Bafana earned him recognition as one of the country’s promising center midfielders.His rising market value sort of matched the confidence that clubs had in his ability, and his steady showings made clear why he was seen as a player with serious potential.After his passing, a lot of supporters have been looking back at what he achieved both for club and international duties.Even if his estimated net worth stayed modest next to global football stars, his impact on the pitch and the respect he gained across his career still, honestly, matter a lot more as the legacy he left behind.
Article Summary: Jayden adams made a name for himself as a central midfielder for mamelodi sundowns and the south african national team. Although neither adams nor his club ever publicly disclosed his finances, online estimates placed his net worth at around in 2026.

Article Title: NFL Free Agency Rumor: Kansas City Chiefs and Baltimore Ravens emerge as top landing spots for $69M star wide receiver
Article Text:
The New England Patriots’ former wide receiver, Stefon Diggs, was a force to be reckoned with on the field in the last season even though the team ended up losing the Super Bowl which had disappointed many. It has been a few months since he was released by the team as he continues to remain a free agent. Amid all the mess, the Kansas City Chiefs and the Baltimore Ravens have emerged as potential landing spots.

Latest Insider Update



Kansas City Chiefs and the Baltimore Ravens have emerged as potential landing spots.





Which teams are interested in Stefon Diggs?



What are insiders saying about the rumors?

How will the teams be impacted?



The New England Patriots’ former wide receiver, Stefon Diggs , was a force to be reckoned with on the field in the last season even though the team ended up losing the Super Bowl. It has been a few months since he was released by the team as he continues to remain a free agent. Amid all the mess, the Kansas City Chiefs and the Baltimore Ravens have emerged as potential landing spots.Ever since Stefon Diggs was released by the New England Patriots, a number of teams have been linked to him even though he remains a free agent.As per NFL insiders, the Kansas City Chiefs and the Baltimore Ravens could make a move for him, ahead of the new season.Michael Moraitis of The Big Lead noted in a recent report, “The Chiefs’ problems at wide receiver start with Rashee Rice, who is a question mark for multiple reasons. Xavier Worthy is coming off a disappointing season, Tyquan Thornton went missing after a hot start to the 2025 campaign and neither Cyrus Allen nor Jalen Royals are guaranteed to offer much, if anything, in their first and second seasons, respectively. Kansas City desperately needs another impact veteran target for Patrick Mahomes ahead of a season in which the Chiefs are looking to get back to the playoffs. Diggs would be just that.”Michael Moraitis added, “Rashod Bateman has been streaky during his career, as evidenced by his 515- and 756-yard campaigns being surrounded by seasons in which he has tallied 285, 367 and 224 yards. As things stand now, the Ravens are also prepared to rely heavily on one of more of their unproven wideouts like Devontez Walker, Elijah Sarratt and Ja’Kobi Lane. That’s simply not good enough for a team that has its sights set on the playoffs after falling short in 2025. ”The Kansas City Chiefs have $4.2 million in available cap space so if the team signs Stefon Diggs, they would have to make changes in a few contracts, including with Trey Smith or Chris Jones. Stefon Diggs would be an impactful addition to the team as he gives Patrick Mahomes a clutch target.The Baltimore Ravens have $16 million in effective cap space so signing Stefon Diggs would be easier. The star wide receiver would act as a lethal secondary weapon alongside Zay Flowers.
Article Summary: Stefon diggs was a force to be reckoned with on the field in the last season even though the team ended up losing the super bowl. The kansas city chiefs and the baltimore ravens have emerged as potential landing spots. The star wide receiver would act as a lethal secondary weapon alongside zay flowers.

Article Title: Brad Marchand shares special daughter training session while preparing for Florida Panthers NHL season return
Article Text:
Brad Marchand #63 of the Florida Panthers with wife Katrina and children Sloane, Sawyer and Rue for a celebration for Brad Marchand for his 1,000th point prior to tonights game against the Montreal Canadiens at the Amerant Bank Arena on December 30, 2025 in Sunrise, Florida. (Photo by Eliot J. Schechter/NHLI via Getty Images)

Brad Marchand trains with daughter during Florida Panthers NHL offseason



How is Brad Marchand preparing for next NHL season



Why does Marchand offseason training matter for Panthers



Florida Panthers forward Brad Marchand recently gave a glimpse into his offseason workout routine, working out at home with his young daughter. The veteran winger is still focused on being ready for the next NHL season while turning a routine fitness session into a memorable family moment.A training video posted by Marchand’s family showed the Florida Panthers star working out, with his daughter attempting to mimic his movements. The moment soon became a talking point for NHL fans as it showcased a different side of the highly competitive forward.Known as a fiery competitor, a leader and an aggressive player, Brad Marchand is one of the most competitive players in the NHL. But the off-season workout offered a glimpse into his life away from the rigors of NHL competition.Marchand was doing strength and conditioning work, and his daughter was joining in with her own little weights. The chat delved into how the Florida Panthers forward manages his pro training requirements and family engagement.Brad Marchand is preparing for the upcoming NHL season with consistent offseason workouts to keep himself strong, in shape and ready for the games. As one of the veterans on the Florida Panthers roster, being physically prepared is still a big part of his routine.The forward joined the Florida after a major chapter in his career with the Boston Bruins and played a valuable part in the Panthers’ championship success. His continued dedication to fitness demonstrates his desire to remain a productive part of the team as he enters the later stages of his NHL career.The Florida Panthers want to remain one of the NHL’s top contenders, and Marchand’s offseason preparation could go a long way toward that. His experience, scoring ability and leadership bring significant value to a roster built for championship expectations.Throughout his career, the 38-year-old striker has been noted for his strong work ethic. Even moments like his daughter’s participation in training hint at the personal motivations for his commitment to hockey.The offseason gives NHL players a chance to regain their fitness level, enhance their conditioning and prepare themselves mentally for the opening of training camps. For Brad Marchand, it’s about preparing to endure another grind of a season with the Florida Panthers.
Article Summary: Florida panthers forward brad marchand recently gave a glimpse into his offseason workout routine, working out at home with his young daughter. A training video posted by marchand’s family showed the florida panthers star working out, with his daughter attempting to mimic his movements.

Article Title: "I want to protect my family": Erling Haaland's girlfriend reveals the challenge of protecting her family while living in the spotlight
Article Text:
Erling Haaland's World Cup success has renewed interest in his private life with longtime girlfriend Isabel Haugseng Johansen. The former footballer, now a fashion creator and mother, says she wants to protect her family's privacy while allowing people to know her better. The couple, who began dating after Johansen messaged Haaland on Instagram, continue to keep their son out of the public eye.

Erling Haaland and Isabel Haugseng Johansen's relationship began with a simple Instagram message

Isabel Haugseng Johansen balances motherhood, fashion and life beside Erling Haaland

Erling Haaland is back in the public spotlight thanks to his performances at the 2026 FIFA World Cup but away from the packed stadiums and goal celebrations, the Norway striker lives a much quieter life with long-term partner Isabel Haugseng Johansen. While Haaland is the star of Norway’s historic tournament run, the woman who has been along for the ride long before he became one of the biggest names in football has also garnered renewed attention.Long before Haaland became a household name, he and Johansen shared the same roots in Bryne, Norway. Both played football at the local club, giving them a common understanding of the sport that has remained central to their relationship.Their romance, however, did not begin on the training ground. After Haaland moved to Germany to join Borussia Dortmund, Johansen made the first move by sending him a direct message on Instagram.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Reflecting on how it started, Haaland previously admitted:"She sent me a message."He added:"She was the one who checked me out. I wasn’t the one who checked her out."Since then, the couple have built a relationship that contrasts sharply with the attention surrounding Haaland's football career.Rather than glamorous celebrity outings, they have spoken about enjoying simple routines together. Haaland has said he likes cooking dinner at home, while Johansen enjoys gaming, with Minecraft becoming one of their favorite ways to relax together.When they return to their hometown, they reportedly keep things equally low-key, often choosing takeaway kebab pizza from a local restaurant instead of lavish nights out.Although Haaland's football success has brought financial rewards, including luxury properties and an impressive supercar collection, Johansen has quietly established her own identity.After playing football in her younger years, she shifted her focus toward fashion and digital content creation. She has since collaborated with brands, appeared on magazine covers in Norway and developed a growing social media following.ID@undefinedCaption not available.Speaking about how her style has evolved, Johansen told MinMote:"For so many years, I lived in my football clothes."She explained that fashion now reflects her "personality and mood," while favoring timeless pieces over fast-moving trends.Motherhood has also influenced her outlook. Johansen has said she now chooses clothing that allows her to keep up with everyday family life while still expressing her personal style.The couple welcomed their son in December 2024 but have intentionally kept his identity private.Discussing that decision, Johansen told KK magazine:"I want to protect my family, but at the same time I want people to have the opportunity to get to know me and who I am better."She continued:"Then the challenge becomes setting boundaries for what is private and what is not."During Norway's World Cup campaign, Johansen has remained a regular presence in the stands, supporting Haaland while sharing carefully selected moments from the tournament.Haaland has also spoken about how becoming a father has changed his perspective. Instead of dwelling on every match or missed opportunity, he now says family life helps him disconnect from football, offering balance away from the pressure of competing at the highest level.
Article Summary: Erling haaland and isabel haugseng johansen began dating after she messaged him on instagram. The couple welcomed their son in december 2024 but have intentionally kept his identity private. Johansen says she wants to protect her family's privacy while allowing people to know her better.

His leadership, passing ability and experience in high-pressure matches make him one of Switzerland’s most important players.Against a strong Argentina side led by world-class talent, Switzerland will need Xhaka to control possession, slow the tempo when needed and help organize the team in midfield.His calmness on the ball and ability to switch play could be vital if Switzerland hope to compete with the defending champions.Although fans will have to wait for the official team sheet before kickoff, everything points to Xhaka being available and ready to start.Xhaka has built one of the most successful careers in Swiss football history. Article Title: ‘This doesn’t look good’: The World Cup moment involving Gianni Infantino that left England fans fuming
Article Text:
FIFA President Gianni Infantino attends the World Cup quarterfinal soccer match between Norway and England in Miami Gardens, Fla., Saturday, July 11, 2026. (AP Photo/George Walker IV)

Images from the VIP box sparked online reaction

FIFA President Gianni Infantino, left, gives a thumbs up next to Norway's Crown Prince Haakon prior to the World Cup quarterfinal soccer match between Norway and England in Miami Gardens, Fla., Saturday, July 11, 2026. (AP Photo/Lynne Sladky)

Why Infantino was sitting with Prince Haakon

England reached the semi-finals regardless

England's dramatic 2-1 extra-time victory over Norway in the FIFA World Cup 2026 quarter-finals produced plenty of talking points on the pitch, but one moment in the stands also sparked a wave of reaction online. FIFA president Gianni Infantino was shown sitting alongside Norway's Crown Prince Haakon Magnus throughout the match in Miami, prompting some England supporters to question whether the optics were appropriate amid several contentious refereeing decisions.The images quickly spread across social media, with some fans questioning the seating arrangement in light of the match’s controversial officiating. While the seating sparked speculation online, the arrangement was part of the official protocol for the occasion, with the Norwegian royal seated alongside the FIFA president.As television cameras repeatedly cut to FIFA's VIP section during England's quarter-final against Norway, viewers noticed Infantino sitting next to Crown Prince Haakon Magnus.Behind the FIFA president were several of football's biggest names, including Brazilian legends Ronaldo Nazário and Kaká, Italian great Alessandro Del Piero and former Brazil captain Cafu.It was Haakon's presence beside Infantino, rather than the collection of football icons, that immediately became the focus of discussion online.One supporter posted on X: "Infantino is sitting next to as his special guest - only the Prince of Norway. Not biased at all then."Another wrote: "My biggest issue with this game is that the head of FIFA is sitting with Norwegian royalty watching the game."A third added: "Infantino should not be sat with the Crown Prince of Norway, surely."Others connected the seating arrangement to some of the game's key officiating moments, particularly after England saw an extra-time penalty overturned by VAR and Norway had a second-half goal disallowed following a foul by Erling Haaland in the build-up.Despite the online speculation, there is no indication that Infantino's seating arrangement was unusual or inappropriate.As FIFA president, Infantino routinely hosts heads of state, members of royal families, government officials and invited dignitaries at World Cup matches.Crown Prince Haakon was attending in his official capacity as Norway's representative during one of the nation's biggest football matches in decades, with Ståle Solbakken's side playing in their first World Cup quarter-final since returning to the tournament for the first time since 1998.Hosting the Norwegian royal alongside FIFA's president is standard diplomatic protocol for a tournament organiser and does not suggest any involvement in sporting decisions or match officiating.Despite the online reaction surrounding Infantino's appearance alongside Prince Haakon, the match itself ended in England's favour.Norway took the lead through Andreas Schjelderup before Jude Bellingham equalised in first-half stoppage time. The Real Madrid midfielder then struck again early in extra time, scoring the winner to seal a 2-1 victory and send Thomas Tuchel's side into the World Cup semi-finals.Infantino has remained a central figure throughout the tournament, with FIFA facing scrutiny over several refereeing controversies, including the decision to suspend USA forward Folarin Balogun's red-card ban following an appeal that reportedly involved US President Donald Trump contacting the FIFA president. While those issues have kept the governing body under intense examination, there is no evidence that Infantino's decision to host Norway's Crown Prince during the quarter-final had any influence on the outcome of England's victory.
Article Summary: Fifa president gianni infantino sat alongside norway's crown prince haakon magnus during england's 2-1 world cup 2026 quarter-final victory over norway. Images from the vip box sparked online reaction, with some england fans questioning the optics of the seating arrangement.

Article Title: FIFA World Cup: Explained - Why Breel Embolo was shown red card after VAR review in Argentina vs Switzerland QF
Article Text:
Breel Embolo (PTI Photo)

Why was Embolo shown a red card?



Rare use of 'mistaken identity' rule



The others were:

Switzerland question the decision



Argentina seal semifinal place



Switzerland forward Breel Embolo was sent off during his side's FIFA World Cup 2026 quarterfinal against Argentina after a dramatic VAR review on Saturday. The incident happened shortly after Switzerland had equalised to make it 1-1 in the second half.Referee initially showed a yellow card to Argentina midfielder Leandro Paredes for a challenge on Embolo. However, a video review told a different story.VAR found that Embolo had started falling before Paredes made any contact with him. The referee then overturned the original decision and ruled that Embolo had tried to win a foul by simulation.Since the Switzerland striker had already been booked earlier in the match, he received a second yellow card, which automatically became a red card.Embolo left the field in tears and was comforted by his teammates on the sidelines.The decision was made using FIFA's "mistaken identity" protocol. The rule allows VAR to step in if the referee has shown a yellow or red card to the wrong player.It was only the second time in FIFA World Cup history that this protocol had been used to overturn a yellow-card decision.Embolo also became just the fourth player in the last 60 years to receive a second yellow card for simulation at a World Cup.Luis Pérez (Mexico) vs Portugal in 2006Asamoah Gyan (Ghana) vs Brazil in 2006Francesco Totti (Italy) vs South Korea in 2002The red card came just minutes after Dan Ndoye had equalised for Switzerland, completely changing the momentum of the match.Swiss defender Nico Elvedi questioned the decision after the game."I just don't understand how VAR can make that kind of decision."Reduced to 10 men, Switzerland struggled to hold off the defending champions.Argentina eventually made their extra man count in extra time.Julian Alvarez scored a stunning long-range goal in the 112th minute before Lautaro Martinez added another in stoppage time of extra time to seal a 3-1 victory.Alexis Mac Allister had earlier given Argentina the lead from a Lionel Messi corner before Ndoye levelled the scores in the second half.After the match, Alvarez praised his team's fighting spirit."We're among the best four, so we're meeting our objectives, and we knew it wasn't going to be easy. The whole match was hard, and we would have loved to have the win earlier, but we tried to get the win however we could."The opponent was really good but we fought until the end, and finally the goals came."Argentina have now reached the World Cup semifinals, where they will face England.
Article Summary: Switzerland forward breel embolo was sent off during his side's fifa world cup 2026 quarterfinal against argentina. The incident happened shortly after switzerland had equalised to make it 1-1 in the second half. Referee initially showed a yellow card to argentina midfielder leandro paredes for a challenge on embolo.

Article Title: “Three-against-one situation”: El Rubius opens up on being “targeted” in MrBeast’s viral $1M challenge
Article Text:
El Rubius reacted honestly after his elimination from MrBeast’s $1 million challenge, calling it “unfair” and claiming he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings. His response felt real and balanced, especially after MrBeast’s team later sent him a cake, softening the moment.

El Rubius reflects on a tough and “unfair” exit







El Rubius did not just walk away from MrBeast’s $1 million streamer challenge. He opened up. Soon after his elimination, the Spanish creator shared a raw reaction with fans, giving them a closer look at what the experience felt like from inside the game. It was not polished or carefully framed. It felt real, and that is exactly why it caught attention so quickly.The clip and his response have since fueled conversations across the streaming space. Some viewers believe intense competitions like this naturally lead to uneven situations. Others feel Rubius may have had a point about being singled out. Either way, his words have added a human layer to a challenge that many only saw as entertainment.Speaking through an Instagram Story, Rubius did not hide his frustration, but he also made sure to thank his supporters. He said, "Guys, I just got knocked out of the game. It was a bit of an unfair elimination, but hey, at least I managed to walk away with $50,000 for you all, which I’ve already distributed. It went to the mods, the subs, and the non-subs alike."He further added, "I’m happy, of course, though admittedly, it was incredibly tough.I wasn't really a fan of the challenge itself, either. But then again... it was basically a three-against-one situation the entire time. I mean, they were targeting me specifically the whole way through. I kept trying to go after RaKai, but, well, he actually just got eliminated in the end. So, at least justice was served for Abraham. Abraham, if you’re watching this, we were all rooting for you, and standing right there with you."His message carried mixed emotions. There was disappointment, yes, but also pride in how he handled things. Giving away his $50,000 winnings to his community stood out as a gesture that meant more than the result itself.He continued with another honest note, saying, "And in the end, karma finally caught up with that little punk. Sorry, I’m being a bit toxic right now, but let's just hope the MrBeast team doesn't see this! Guys, thank you all so much. Seriously, thank you for all the support and for just being there."He added, "Every time I asked for something in the chat or whatever it was, you guys were right there. You’re incredible. I’m a little disappointed in myself, personally, mostly for not performing better, but hey, I gave it my all, and we still walked away with $50,000, so we’ve got to look on the bright side. All right, guys, big hugs to all my brothers out there!"Interestingly, the story did not end with frustration. Later that day, Rubius revealed that MrBeast’s team had sent him a cake after his exit. It was a small gesture, but it shifted the mood. It showed that even in a high-pressure challenge, there is still room for respect.In the end, Rubius’ reaction felt honest and grounded. That is what stayed with people.
Article Summary: El rubius was eliminated from mrbeast's $1 million challenge. He called it "unfair" and said he was targeted in a three-against-one situation. Despite his frustration, he thanked fans and gave away his $50,000 winnings.

Article Title: IPL craze costs techie Rs 1.46 lakh in fake RCB vs CSK ticket scam
Article Text:
Image credit: AI generated pic

RCB register their second win

Poll Vote & Share your view Do you think the demand for IPL tickets is too high every season? Yes, it's excessive. No, it's just right. 3k+ users shared opinion today 5k+ users already voted today 3k+ users shared opinion today Share Opinion

NEW DELHI: IPL comes and the demand for tickets and passes go soaring up by the fans. The desperation to get inside the stadium to watch their favourite teams in action in the IPL go high and high. When the tickets get sold out, the demand gets too hig, and the cricket fans even ask for tickets in black. But for a 25-year-old techie the craze for IPL tickets for RCB vs CSK turned too costly and he was duped for a massive Rs. 1.46 lakh.The techie, a resident of B Narayanapura, fell into a trap by a post posted by a fraudster who posed himself as a ticket seller on Instagram.As per a report in Deccan Herald, the techie alleged in a complaint to Mahadevapura Police that an individual claiming to be Sumit Biswal promised he could arrange IPL tickets along with food coupons.As per the techie, Biswal was introduced him as a senior supervisor for ticket counter at M Chinnaswamy Stadium"He asked me to come near the stadium gate number 10, saying someone would deliver the tickets within minutes, and even sent an email confirmation to gain my trust," the complainant told Deccan Herald."Initially, I agreed to buy two tickets for Rs 3,700 each,but he kept asking for more money under various pretexts such as refundable security deposits, additional ID cards and food coupons.Trusting him, I made multiple payments - even using my mother’s bank account after exhausting my own limits—and ended up transferring around Rs 1.46 lakh," he added.Bhuvneshwar Kumar’s incisive spell of 3-41, coming after a marauding batting show from Tim David, Rajat Patidar and Devdutt Padikkal, propelled Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) to a commanding 43-run victory over Chennai Super Kings (CSK) in their IPL 2026 encounter at the M Chinnaswamy Stadium on Sunday.The contest saw RCB’s batting unit dismantle CSK’s attack with relentless hitting, as David’s 70 not out off just 25 balls and Patidar’s unbeaten 48 off only 19 balls provided for the late fireworks after Padikkal’s fluent 50 off 29 balls had set the tone for the daunting total.Their combined effort lifted RCB to a daunting 250/3, thus setting a new record for highest total in IPL 2026. In reply, CSK faltered under scoreboard pressure, with Sarfaraz Khan’s 50 off 24 balls and Prashant Veer’s 43 the lone acts of resistance amid a string of failures from the top order.Bhuvneshwar was at his disciplined best and even crossed the 200-mark in terms of wickets in IPL, with others also chipping in as CSK were bowled out for 207 in 19.4 overs. The comprehensive win also meant RCB have registered four consecutive triumphs over CSK for the first time in the IPL’s history.
Article Summary: Royal challengers bengaluru (rcb) beat chennai super kings (csk) in ipl 2026 encounter at the m chinnaswamy stadium on sunday. Rcb register their second win over csk in the ipl. Tim david, rajat patidar and devdutt padikkal all scored half-centuries for rcb. Bhuvneshwar kumar took 3-41 to help rcb reach 250/3.

Article Title: Why Haaland is a very 'English' name: Viking roots, England connection and the surprising story behind his surname
Article Text:
Erling Haaland leads teammates in a Viking-style boat-row celebration (AP Photo)

A Norwegian name with English roots

England's language owes a debt to the Vikings

A fitting twist before England vs Norway

The modern Viking leading Norway's charge

Football's biggest social media star

As England prepare to face Norway in a blockbuster FIFA World Cup quarter-final on Sunday (July 12), all eyes will be on Erling Haaland, the prolific striker who was born in England, raised in Norway and now leads the Scandinavian side's historic charge. Beyond the goals and Viking celebrations, however, lies an unexpected linguistic twist.Haaland's surname, despite sounding unmistakably Norwegian, may actually be far more English than many fans realise.According to a BBC report, language experts say the name "Haaland" reflects the deep historical links between Old Norse and Old English, making it as much a part of England's medieval story as Norway's.Haaland is originally a Norwegian surname derived from the Old Norse words meaning "high land". But, as Professor Richard Dance of the University of Cambridge told the BBC, the ancestry of the name is shared by both Old Norse and Old English because the two languages sprang from the same Germanic family."They're both Germanic languages," Dance was quoted as saying by the BBC. "People speaking Old Norse and people speaking Old English could probably have talked to each other."That is also why "Haaland" sounds strikingly similar to the English phrase "high land".According to the professor, the resemblance is no coincidence but evidence of a shared linguistic heritage dating back more than a thousand years.Haaland's surname is just one example of how deeply Viking influence is woven into the English language.The Vikings were Scandinavian seafarers, traders and warriors from present-day Norway, Denmark and Sweden who settled parts of northern England more than 1,000 years ago. Scandinavian settlers left behind words and place names that are still in use today.Everyday northern English words such as lass, nay, lug and tyke, along with place-name endings like "by" and terms such as beck, fell and tarn, all trace their origins to Old Norse.The linguistic story becomes even more fascinating due to Haaland's personal connection to England.The Manchester City striker was born in Leeds on July 21, 2000, while his father, Alf-Inge Haaland, was playing for Leeds United in the Premier League.Although he was eligible to represent England because of his birthplace, the family moved back to Bryne in Norway when Erling was three, and he has represented Norway throughout his international career.Now, 26 years later, the striker returns to face the country of his birth in one of the biggest matches in Norwegian football history.Norway booked a historic first-ever men's World Cup quarter-final after stunning Brazil 2-1 in the Round of 16, while England edged Mexico 3-2 to set up Sunday's mouth-watering clash.Standing 6ft 4in, Haaland has become the face of Norway's new football generation. His explosive pace, physicality and remarkable goalscoring have earned him comparisons with a modern Viking warrior, an image that has only grown during the World Cup.Following Norway's biggest victories, Haaland has led teammates in the now-famous "Viking Row" celebration, with players sitting in a line, mimicking the rowing of a Viking ship while beating an imaginary drum.The celebration has become one of the tournament's defining images and even inspired a Google Easter egg featuring Viking boats when users search his name.Away from the pitch, Haaland has become one of the tournament's biggest internet sensations. His World Cup highlight reels and short-form videos have garnered hundreds of millions of views across social media, fuelled by spectacular goals, thunderous finishes and his famously unfiltered personality.Fans have embraced not only his record-breaking exploits but also his goofy humour, deadpan interviews and meme-worthy moments, making him one of football's most relatable global superstars.As England prepare to stop Haaland from ending their World Cup dream, his surname also tells the story of a centuries-old bond between England and Norway.Long before football rivalries, Viking settlers helped shape the language spoken across northern England. So while Haaland may lead Norway's attack against England on Sunday, his surname reflects the shared history of the two nations, showing that one of football's biggest names also has surprisingly English roots.
Article Summary: England face norway in world cup quarter-final on sunday (july 12) erling haaland was born in england, raised in norway and now leads the scandinavian side's historic charge. His surname, despite sounding unmistakably norwegian, may actually be far more english than many fans realise.
